reviews.comment:
Por una distracción del playero me cargaron NAFTA el lugar de gasoil. No me di cuenta hasta que llegue a mi casa, varios km después. En el momento se hicieron cargo de la limpieza del tanque y cambio de filtro, pero luego de varias semanas se arruinaron los inyectores por esa mezcla.tuve que pagar $200.000 y nadie se hizo cargo pese a que es evidente que se debió al error en la carga de combustible. Voy a iniciar una demanda en la.juaticia

(Translated by Google)
Due to a lapse in attention by the gas station attendant, they filled my tank with gasoline instead of diesel. I didn't realize it until I got home, several kilometers later. At the time, they cleaned the tank and changed the filter, but after several weeks, the injectors were ruined by the mixture. I had to pay $200,000 and no one took responsibility, even though it was clearly due to the fueling error. I am going to file a lawsuit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXX3QtRWhnRRAB
